info.description: This is the API server for OpAMP Commander, providing endpoints for managing OpAMP agents.
info.title: OpAMP Commander API Server

get.description: Authenticate using basic auth credentials.
Returns the GitHub OAuth2 authentication URL.
Returns an OAuth2 authorization URL whose state encodes a CLI loopback redirect URI.
get.summary: GitHub OAuth2 Auth Code URL with CLI loopback redirect

get.description: Initiates device authorization for GitHub OAuth2.
Exchanges a device code for an authentication token.

parameters.description: Optional expiry time in RFC3339 format
parameters.name: expiry

get.description: Get Authentication Info.

post.description: Exchange a refresh token for a new access token (and rotated refresh token).

get.description: Retrieves a list of agent groups with pagination options.

parameters.description: Maximum number of agent groups to return
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Token to continue listing agent groups
parameters.name: continue

get.description: Retrieve an agent group by its ID.

delete.description: Mark an agent group as deleted.

get.description: Retrieve a list of agent packages.

parameters.description: Maximum number of agent packages to return
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Token to continue listing agent packages
parameters.name: continue

get.description: Retrieve an agent package by its name.

delete.description: Delete an agent package by its name.

get.description: Retrieve a list of agents in a namespace.

parameters.description: Maximum number of agents to return
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Search agents by instance UID query in a namespace.

parameters.description: Maximum number of agents to return
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Retrieve an agent by its instance UID in a namespace.

put.description: Update an agent's metadata & spec in a namespace.

get.description: Retrieve a list of certificates.

parameters.description: Maximum number of certificates to return
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Retrieve a certificate by its name.

delete.description: Delete a certificate by its name.

get.description: Retrieve a list of connections in a namespace.
Retrieves a list of role bindings with pagination options.

parameters.description: Maximum number of role bindings to return
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Retrieve a role binding by namespace and name.

delete.description: Mark a role binding as deleted.

get.description: Ping the server to check if it is alive.
Retrieve a list of roles.

parameters.description: Maximum number of roles to return
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Retrieve a role by its UID.

delete.description: Delete a role by its UID.

get.description: Retrieve a list of all alive servers.
Retrieve a list of users.

parameters.description: Maximum number of users to return
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Retrieve the current authenticated user's profile with roles and permissions.
Retrieve a user by its UID.

delete.description: Delete a user by its UID.

get.description: Retrieve the server version information.
Redirects to GitHub for OAuth2 authentication.
Exchanges the code received from GitHub for an authentication token.

parameters.description: State parameter to prevent CSRF attacks
parameters.name: state

parameters.description: Code received from GitHub after authentication
parameters.name: code

get.description: Check if the service is healthy
Check if the service is ready

metadata.description: Metadata contains identifying information about the agent.

spec.description: Spec contains the desired configuration for the agent.

status.description: Status contains the observed state of the agent.

identifyingAttributes.description: IdentifyingAttributes are attributes that uniquely identify the agent.

nonIdentifyingAttributes.description: NonIdentifyingAttributes are attributes that do not uniquely identify the agent.

conditions.description: Conditions is a list of conditions that apply to the agent group.

numAgents.description: NumAgents is the total number of agents in the agent group.

numConnectedAgents.description: NumConnectedAgents is the number of connected agents in the agent group.

numHealthyAgents.description: NumHealthyAgents is the number of healthy agents in the agent group.

numNotConnectedAgents.description: NumNotConnectedAgents is the number of not connected agents in the agent group.

numUnhealthyAgents.description: NumUnhealthyAgents is the number of unhealthy agents in the agent group.

capabilities.description: Capabilities is a bitmask representing the capabilities of the agent.

customCapabilities.description: CustomCapabilities is a map of custom capabilities for the agent.

description.description: Description is a human-readable description of the agent.

instanceUid.description: InstanceUID is a unique identifier for the agent instance.

namespace.description: Namespace is the namespace the agent belongs to.

name.description: Name is the name of the package.

connectionSettings.description: ConnectionSettings contains connection settings for the agent.

newInstanceUid.description: NewInstanceUID is a new instance UID to inform the agent of its new identity.

packagesAvailable.description: PackagesAvailable is the packages available for the agent to download.

remoteConfig.description: RemoteConfig is the remote configuration of the agent.

restartRequiredAt.description:
RestartRequiredAt is the time when a restart was requested.
If this time is after the agent's start time, the agent should be restarted.

packages.description: Packages is a list of package names available for the agent.

remoteConfigNames.description: RemoteConfigNames is a list of remote config names applied to this agent.

availableComponents.description: AvailableComponents lists components available on the agent.

componentHealth.description: ComponentHealth is the health status of the agent's components.

conditions.description: Conditions is a list of conditions that apply to the agent.

connected.description: Connected indicates if the agent is currently connected.

connectionType.description: ConnectionType indicates the type of connection the agent is using.

effectiveConfig.description: EffectiveConfig is the effective configuration of the agent.

lastReportedAt.description: LastReportedAt is the timestamp when the agent last reported its status.

packageStatuses.description: PackageStatuses is a map of package statuses for the agent.

sequenceNum.description: SequenceNum is the sequence number from the last AgentToServer message.

expiresAt.description: ExpiresAt is the time when the access token expires.

refreshToken.description: RefreshToken is the refresh token used to obtain a new access token without re-authentication.

apiVersion.description: APIVersion is the version of the API.

kind.description: Kind is the type of the resource.

metadata.description: Metadata contains the metadata of the certificate.

spec.description: Spec contains the specification of the certificate.

status.description: Status contains the status of the certificate.

attributes.description: Attributes are optional key-value pairs for the certificate.

createdAt.description: CreatedAt is the timestamp when the certificate was created.

deletedAt.description:
DeletedAt is the timestamp when the certificate was soft deleted.
If nil, the certificate is not deleted.

name.description: Name is the unique name of the certificate.

namespace.description: Namespace is the namespace the certificate belongs to.

caCert.description: CaCert is the PEM-encoded CA certificate.

privateKey.description: PrivateKey is the PEM-encoded private key.

conditions.description: Conditions contains the conditions of the certificate.

alive.description: Alive indicates whether the connection is currently alive.

id.description: ID is the unique identifier of the connection.

instanceUid.description: InstanceUID is the unique identifier of the agent instance.

lastCommunicatedAt.description: LastCommunicatedAt is the timestamp of the last communication with the agent.

namespace.description: Namespace is the namespace the connection belongs to.

type.description: Type is the type of connection (e.g., "http", "websocket").

opamp.description: OpAMP contains OpAMP server connection settings.

otherConnections.description: OtherConnections contains other connection settings mapped by name.

ownLogs.description: OwnLogs contains own logs connection settings.

ownMetrics.description: OwnMetrics contains own metrics connection settings.

ownTraces.description: OwnTraces contains own traces connection settings.

expiry.description: Expiry is when the device code and user code expire

interval.description: Interval is the duration in seconds that Poll should wait between requests

userCode.description: UserCode is the code the user should enter at the verification uri

verificationUri.description: VerificationURI is where user should enter the user code

verificationUriComplete.description:
VerificationURIComplete (if populated) includes the user code in the verification URI.
This is typically shown to the user in non-textual form, such as a QR code.

detail.description:
Detail is a human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.
example: "Your request parameters didn't validate."

instance.description: Instance is a URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem.

status.description:
Status is the HTTP status code generated by the origin server for this occurrence of the problem.
example: 400

title.description:
Title is a short, human-readable summary of the problem type.
example: "Bad Request"

type.description:
Type is a URI reference that identifies the problem type.
example: "https://example.com/probs/out-of-credit"

url.description: URL is the OAuth2 authorization URL.

certificateName.description: CertificateName is the name of the certificate resource to use.

destinationEndpoint.description: DestinationEndpoint is the URL to connect to the OpAMP server.

headers.description: Headers are HTTP headers to include in requests.

certificateName.description: CertificateName is the name of the certificate resource to use.

destinationEndpoint.description: DestinationEndpoint is the URL to connect to.

headers.description: Headers are HTTP headers to include in requests.

refreshToken.description: RefreshToken is the refresh token previously issued by the server.

apiVersion.description: APIVersion is the version of the API.

kind.description: Kind is the type of the resource.

metadata.description: Metadata contains the metadata of the role.

spec.description: Spec contains the specification of the role.

status.description: Status contains the status of the role.

apiVersion.description: APIVersion is the version of the API.

kind.description: Kind is the type of the resource.

metadata.description: Metadata contains the metadata of the role binding.

spec.description: Spec contains the specification of the role binding.

status.description: Status contains the status of the role binding.

createdAt.description: CreatedAt is the timestamp when the role binding was created.

deletedAt.description: DeletedAt is the timestamp when the role binding was soft deleted.

name.description: Name is the unique name of the role binding within the namespace.

namespace.description: Namespace is the namespace scope for this role binding.

updatedAt.description: UpdatedAt is the timestamp when the role binding was last updated.

kind.description: Kind is the type of the referenced resource (e.g., "Role").

name.description: Name is the display name of the role.

roleRef.description: RoleRef references the role to bind.

subjects.description: Subjects lists the principals that this binding grants the role to.

conditions.description: Conditions contains the conditions of the role binding.

apiVersion.description: APIVersion is the API version of the referenced subject; optional.

kind.description: Kind is the type of subject (e.g., "User").

name.description: Name is the principal identifier (for User, the email address).

createdAt.description: CreatedAt is the timestamp when the role was created.

deletedAt.description: DeletedAt is the timestamp when the role was soft deleted.

uid.description: UID is the unique identifier of the role.

updatedAt.description: UpdatedAt is the timestamp when the role was last updated.

description.description: Description is the description of the role.

displayName.description: DisplayName is the display name of the role.

isBuiltIn.description: IsBuiltIn indicates whether the role is a built-in role.

permissions.description: Permissions contains the permission names assigned to the role (e.g., "agent:read").

conditions.description: Conditions contains the conditions of the role.

certificateName.description: CertificateName is the name of the certificate resource to use.

destinationEndpoint.description: DestinationEndpoint is the URL to send telemetry data to.

headers.description: Headers are HTTP headers to include in requests.

apiVersion.description: APIVersion is the version of the API.

kind.description: Kind is the type of the resource.

metadata.description: Metadata contains the metadata of the user.

spec.description: Spec contains the specification of the user.

status.description: Status contains the status of the user.

createdAt.description: CreatedAt is the timestamp when the user was created.

deletedAt.description: DeletedAt is the timestamp when the user was soft deleted.

labels.description:
Labels contains arbitrary key/value pairs attached to the user.
Used for label-selector based role bindings (e.g., login-type, github-org-*).

uid.description: UID is the unique identifier of the user.

updatedAt.description: UpdatedAt is the timestamp when the user was last updated.

roles.description: Roles contains the roles assigned to the user together with the binding that granted each role.

role.description: Role is the role assigned to the user.

roleBinding.description: RoleBinding is the binding that granted this role, if any.

email.description: Email is the email address of the user.

isActive.description: IsActive indicates whether the user is active.

username.description: Username is the username of the user.

conditions.description: Conditions contains the conditions of the user.

roles.description: Roles contains the role IDs assigned to the user.

agentRemoteConfigName.description: AgentRemoteConfigName is the name of a standalone remote configuration resource.

agentRemoteConfigRef.description: AgentRemoteConfigRef is a reference to a standalone remote configuration resource.

agentRemoteConfigSpec.description: AgentRemoteConfigSpec is the remote configuration to be applied to agents in this group.

gid.description:
Gid is the primary group ID.
On POSIX systems, this is a decimal number representing the gid.
On Windows, this is a SID in a string format.
On Plan 9, this is the contents of /dev/user.

homeDir.description: HomeDir is the path to the user's home directory (if they have one).

name.description:
Name is the user's real or display name.
It might be blank.
On POSIX systems, this is the first (or only) entry in the GECOS field
list.
On Windows, this is the user's display name.
On Plan 9, this is the contents of /dev/user.

uid.description:
Uid is the user ID.
On POSIX systems, this is a decimal number representing the uid.
On Windows, this is a security identifier (SID) in a string format.
On Plan 9, this is the contents of /dev/user.
